add_slide.description: Add a new slide to a presentation.

layout.description: Predefined layout: BLANK, TITLE, TITLE_AND_BODY, TITLE_ONLY, etc.
layout.title: Layout

extra.description: App-specific key-value pairs for custom pricing factors
extra.title: Extra

extra.description: App-specific key-value pairs for custom pricing factors
extra.title: Extra

OutputMeta.description:
Structured metadata about task inputs and outputs for pricing calculation.

Apps include this in their output to report what was consumed (inputs)
and what was produced (outputs). The backend uses this with CEL expressions
to calculate app-level pricing.

Example usage in an LLM app:
    output_meta = OutputMeta(
        inputs=[TextMeta(tokens=150)],
        outputs=[TextMeta(tokens=500)]
    )

Example usage in a video generation app:
    output_meta = OutputMeta(
        outputs=[VideoMeta(
            resolution="1080p",
            resolution_mp=2.07,
            seconds=10.5,
            fps=30
        )]
    )
OutputMeta.title: OutputMeta
